title: Argentina CUIT Registration / Data Modification for Legal Entities (Formulario 460/J)
description: Argentina's Administración Federal de Ingresos Públicos (AFIP) Formulario 460/J — 'Solicitud de Inscripción — Personas Jurídicas' — the standard AcroForm PDF used by a legal entity (company, association, foundation, cooperative, or similar) to request a fresh CUIT (Clave Única de Identificación Tributaria) registration, or to notify AFIP of a modification to previously registered data, including its fiscal and legal addresses, main and secondary economic activities, legal form, registered taxes and withholding/collection regimes, employer registration for social-security purposes, and the natural persons acting as its officers or authorities. The source PDF prints the same 2-page form twice — pages 1-2 are the 'ORIGINAL' copy retained by AFIP and pages 3-4 are the 'DUPLICADO' copy (a stamped receipt-of-filing acknowledgement returned to the taxpayer, carrying AFIP's own disclaimer that the receipt stamp does not signify the Administration's agreement with the content) — so this document models the 175 distinct underlying fields once, not the 351 total widget instances across all 4 pages; see VERIFICATION.md for the full structural disclosure. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Administración Federal de Ingresos Públicos or the Argentine government.

source.documentRef: Formulario 460/J, 'Solicitud de Inscripción — Personas Jurídicas', AFIP's own interactive-forms library

verification.notes: Authored from a fresh curl fetch of the source directly from serviciosweb.afip.gob.ar with a browser User-Agent (HTTP 200, content-type application/pdf, exactly 224,536 bytes, SHA-256 20acb44b3bcf8bbcd14d2c08b2da16c93c71ad349826b6f685cc12eca27205f8). Confirmed with a fresh pdfjs-dist extraction (getDocument().numPages === 4; getFieldObjects() returns 177 keys; page.getAnnotations() returns 351 total Widget-subtype annotations across the 4 pages, 73/104/73/101 per page) that this is a genuine 4-page AcroForm carrying the same 2-page form printed twice (an 'ORIGINAL' copy on pages 1-2 and a 'DUPLICADO' copy on pages 3-4), collapsing to 177 unique field names of which 2 ('inscripciond'/'modificaciond') are non-editable JS-driven mirror checkboxes, leaving 175 real independent input fields — all modeled here, none omitted. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, the disclosed original/duplicate structural finding, and the mock conformance test run.

fields.name: isNewRegistrationRequest
fields.label: Request type: new CUIT registration
fields.description: One of two mutually exclusive request-type checkboxes (see 'exclusivityGroups': 'requestTypeSelection'). The source's footnote (1) reads 'Marcar con una X según corresponda' (mark with an X as applicable).

fields.name: isDataModificationRequest
fields.label: Request type: modification of existing registration data

fields.name: existingCuit
fields.label: Existing CUIT (Clave Única de Identificación Tributaria)
fields.description: Combines 11 single-digit boxes ('CUIT1' through 'CUIT11' in the source AcroForm) into the entity's existing Argentine tax identifier, standardly displayed hyphenated as NN-NNNNNNNN-N. Required only when this is a data-modification filing, since a fresh registration has no CUIT yet.
fields.sourceRef: 'CUIT' (11 single-digit boxes), Hoja 1, below the transaction-type checkboxes

fields.name: afipOfficeCode
fields.label: Assigned AFIP office code (Dependencia AFIP)
fields.description: Combines 3 single-digit boxes ('dependencia1'..'dependencia3') into the 3-digit code of the taxpayer's assigned local AFIP office.

fields.name: isSpontaneousFiling
fields.label: Reason for filing: spontaneous (voluntary)
fields.description: One of two mutually exclusive reason-for-filing checkboxes (see 'exclusivityGroups': 'motivoDelTramiteSelection'). Same footnote (1) as the request-type checkboxes.
fields.sourceRef: 'MOTIVO DEL TRÁMITE: ESPONTÁNEO' checkbox (field 'espontaneo'), Hoja 1, footnote (1)

fields.name: isOfficialOrderFiling
fields.label: Reason for filing: by administrative order (de oficio)

fields.name: entityLegalName
fields.label: Legal name of the entity
fields.sourceRef: 'DATOS DE IDENTIFICACIÓN' > 'DENOMINACIÓN DE LA ENTIDAD:' (field 'denominacion'), Hoja 1

fields.name: fiscalAddressSector
fields.label: Tax address (domicilio fiscal): sector
fields.description: Not marked mandatory on the source form; applies conditionally to the building type (e.g. a sectored complex).

fields.name: fiscalAddressAdditionalData
fields.label: Tax address (domicilio fiscal): additional address data

fields.name: legalAddressSector
fields.label: Registered/legal address (domicilio legal): sector
fields.description: Not marked mandatory on the source form; applies conditionally to the building type (e.g. a sectored complex).

fields.name: legalAddressAdditionalData
fields.label: Registered/legal address (domicilio legal): additional address data

fields.name: secondaryActivity1Code
fields.label: Secondary economic activity 1 (nomenclator code)
fields.description: The source presents description/code/start-date as one logical row, but its own AcroForm places no conditional-requiredness rule on any of the three, and GovSchema's 'requiredWhen' condition grammar (GSP-0013) has no safe leaf-comparison for "the sibling field was filled in" against an optional string field without risking a false-positive on an absent (as opposed to empty-string) value (see this registry's 'notEquals empty-string absent-field bug' precedent) — so this field is left unconditionally optional, with the expectation that it is filled in together with 'secondaryActivity1Description' stated here in prose rather than as a machine-checkable rule.

fields.name: secondaryActivity1StartDate
fields.label: Secondary economic activity 1 start date
fields.description: Same conditional-in-prose-only treatment as 'secondaryActivity1Code' (see its description).

fields.name: articlesOfIncorporationDate
fields.label: Date of the articles of incorporation / company formation contract
fields.description: Combines 3 boxes ('dd'/'mm'/'aaaa') printed under 'FECHA CONTRATO SOCIAL (DD/MM/AAAA)'.

fields.name: nationalCapitalPercentage
fields.label: Percentage of capital: national
fields.description: The source prints this alongside 'foreignCapitalPercentage' under one shared header, 'PORCENTAJE DE CAPITAL:', suggesting the two figures are meant to describe a single capital-ownership split. However, the form does not print any explicit statement that the two must sum to 100, and GovSchema v0.3's 'crossFieldValidation' grammar (§8.3) supports only direct field-to-field comparisons (equals/notEquals/greaterThan[OrEqual]/lessThan[OrEqual]), not arithmetic sum constraints — so even a confirmed sum-to-100 rule could not be expressed with a 'compare' rule today. Both percentage fields are therefore modeled as independent optional integers; see VERIFICATION.md for the full disclosure of this judgment call.

fields.name: foreignCapitalPercentage
fields.label: Percentage of capital: foreign
fields.description: See 'nationalCapitalPercentage' description for the disclosed sum-to-100 judgment call.

fields.name: controllingBody
fields.label: Controlling/regulatory body (Organismo de Contralor)
fields.description: Free text; no separate code sub-field is present on the source. The form's own footnote (2) lists illustrative codes: '01-IGJ. 02-RPC. 03-INAC Y M. 04-Comisión Nacional de Valores. 05-Otros' (Inspección General de Justicia; Registro Público de Comercio; Instituto Nacional de Asociativismo y Economía Social; National Securities Commission; Other) — quoted here for reference, not encoded as a fixed 'enum' since the field itself is unconstrained free text on the source.

fields.name: jurisdictionAndLocality
fields.label: Jurisdiction / locality (of the controlling body)
fields.description: The source prints two stacked labels, 'JURISDICCIÓN:' and 'LOCALIDAD:', immediately followed by a single shared blank — confirmed by this document's own pdfjs-dist extraction of the underlying AcroForm: exactly one field ('jurisdiccion') occupies that row, with a rect spanning from just after 'LOCALIDAD:' to just before the adjacent 'PROVINCIA:' label. There is no second, distinct field for 'Localidad' anywhere in this document's 175-field extraction. Modeled as one combined field; see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: legalFormOther241
fields.label: Legal form: unlabeled checkbox (code 241)
fields.description: The source PDF's 'FORMA JURÍDICA' grid prints checkbox code '241' as the 28th and final option, positioned immediately after code '240' (Fideicomiso Financiero) in the same row — but this document's own pdfjs-dist getTextContent() extraction of the surrounding header block (approximately y=487-505 in PDF points, spanning every other column's stacked multi-line label) found no printed text of any kind above or near this column. Every other one of the 27 sibling checkboxes carries a clear label; this one does not. This may be a genuinely blank or reserved catch-all column in AFIP's own form design. No label is invented for it; see VERIFICATION.md for the full disclosure.
fields.sourceRef: unlabeled checkbox, code '241' (field '241'), 'FORMA JURÍDICA' table, Hoja 2

fields.name: taxCharacterSubject
fields.label: Taxes (subject of the character/role declaration)
fields.description: Printed under the header 'IMPUESTOS CARÁCTER :' alongside 'taxCharacterRole' — this blank (field 'impuestos') sits directly beneath the 'IMPUESTOS' half of that header, distinct from the 'CARÁCTER' blank. Modeled as free text naming which tax(es) the accompanying character/role declaration applies to; see VERIFICATION.md for the full disclosure of this row's structure.

fields.name: taxCharacterRole
fields.label: Character/role for tax purposes
fields.description: The 'CARÁCTER' blank of the same row (field 'caracter3'), annotated with footnote (3): 'Importador, Productor, Comercializador de Combustibles Líquidos-Ley 23.966 Título III Cap. I)-Bs. Personales: Resp. de Deuda Ajena-Resp. Sustitutos-Administrador Fiduciario. Ganancias y Gcia. Mínima Presunta: Resp. de Deuda Ajena-Administrador Fiduciario-Sociedad Gerente.' Quoted here as the source's own illustrative list of roles; not encoded as a fixed 'enum' since the underlying AcroForm field is unconstrained free text, and it cannot be confirmed the field is meant to hold exactly one verbatim token from that list.

fields.description: Collapses the row's 'SI'/'NO' checkbox pair ('si4'/'no4') into a single boolean, following this registry's established convention for a genuine binary yes/no question (as distinct from the multi-option 'exclusivityGroups' construct used elsewhere in this document).
fields.sourceRef: 'RESIDENTE EN EL PAÍS' SI/NO checkboxes, row 4 (fields 'si4'/'no4'), Hoja 2, footnote (1)

fields.name: signerName
fields.label: Name of the person signing (El que suscribe)

fields.name: signerRoleOrCapacity
fields.label: Signer's role/capacity
fields.description: The source's own footnote (5) lists the expected roles: 'Presidente, Socio Representante Legal o Apoderado' (President, Partner Legal Representative, or Attorney-in-fact).

documents.label: Sworn declaration of data accuracy and completeness
documents.statement: afirma que los datos consignados en este formulario son correctos y completos y que ha confeccionado esta declaración jurada sin omitir ni falsear dato alguno que deba contener, siendo fiel expresión de la verdad. (Translation: affirms that the data recorded on this form is correct and complete, and that this sworn declaration was prepared without omitting or misrepresenting any data it must contain, being a faithful expression of the truth.)
documents.sourceRef: 'DECLARACIÓN JURADA' attestation prose preceding the 'Firma y Sello' line, Hoja 2

documents.label: Signature and seal (Firma y Sello)
documents.sourceRef: 'Firma y Sello:' line, Hoja 2. A separate 'Reservado para certificación de firma:' box on the same line is an AFIP-administrative signature-certification stamp, not modeled here as an input.
